## What

Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## Why

The problem it solves or the reason for the change. Link any related issue
(`Closes #123`).

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is surgical — only what's needed, matching existing style.
- [ ] Added/updated a test under `tests/` (a bug fix includes a reproducing test).
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally.
- [ ] UI built (`cd webui && npm run build`) if `webui/src` changed.
